_instructions: Translate only the 'text' and 'label' fields. Do NOT change codes, values, dimension, type, lite, or scored fields. Return the exact same JSON structure.

questions.text: How central is AI to your company's current strategy?

options.label: Not on the agenda at all
Occasionally discussed but no concrete plans
Part of our strategy in some areas
Actively integrated into strategic planning
Central to how we operate and compete

questions.text: How would you describe leadership's commitment to AI adoption?

options.label: No visible interest from leadership
Awareness but no dedicated sponsorship
One or two senior sponsors actively engaged
Broad leadership buy-in with resources allocated
AI is a board-level priority with dedicated investment

questions.text: Does your organization have a defined AI roadmap or implementation plan?

options.label: No roadmap exists
Being drafted but not finalized
Exists for specific departments or use cases
Company-wide roadmap with clear milestones
Living roadmap actively reviewed and updated quarterly

questions.text: How well aligned is your AI vision across departments?

options.label: Each department does its own thing
Some awareness but no formal alignment
Partial alignment in some areas
Regular cross-department coordination on AI
Fully aligned AI strategy across all departments

questions.text: How often do you personally use AI tools in your work?

options.label: Never
Rarely — a few times a month
Monthly — occasional use
Weekly — regular use
Daily — part of my standard workflow

questions.text: How broadly are AI tools used across your organization?

options.label: Only a few individuals experimenting independently
Specific teams or departments only
Most departments have some usage
Company-wide adoption with varying depth

questions.text: How would you describe the maturity of AI use in your organization?

options.label: Purely experimental — no structured approach
A few use cases proven but not scaled
Several use cases running in production

Enthusiastic — actively exploring
